goal: Для v1 (version_id=1, version_date=20250704) посчитай в sim_masterv2_v9 на минимальном day_u16: 1) countDistinct(idx) для group_by IN (1,2) — это оценка self.frames. 2) С учетом формулы orchestrator: dynamic_reserve_mi8 = max(0, min(8, 400 - frames - det_spawn - 50)). content: phase_start: SQL check dynamic_reserve_mi8 vs actual Mi-8 spawn on min day_u16 for v1 (20250704) in sim_masterv2_v9, group_by IN (1,2).

ClickHouse sim_masterv2_v9 v1(20250704): min_day_u16=1 (group_by IN 1,2). frames countDistinct(idx) @day1: gb1=163, gb2=116. dynamic_reserve_mi8 = max(0,min(8,400-frames_mi8-0-50))=8 (frames_mi8=163). Mi-8 spawn actual @day1: count(pre_status_id=0,status_id=2, group_by=1)=0.
